calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:17am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, George Cook and Chris Sullivan, appear in Pro Per. No appearance by the Respodent, Paulette Brown. Appellants, previously sworn, testify in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
10:28am
No new evidence is marked or retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Judgment Entered
